":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7208635186982947875","book_info":{"abstract":"[末世降临+直播+国运+怪谈+平行世界]
诡异降临蓝星，规则成为人类与不可言说最后的博弈点。
不可言说会从各国随机抽取“天选者”进入诡异世界，成功破解将该国本轮怪谈消失，规定时间内挑战失败则怪谈降临该国。
自认废物作者的尹竹被选入规则怪谈，代表龙国出征。
而第一个诡异世界看起来和平时没有什么区别……吗？
【桌上的日记】
1、我要当个听话的孩子。
2、手表可以告诉我准确的时间。
3、每天记得用开水烫一次下水道。
4、外面很危险，但是出去才有出路！
5、绿色不是安全，是危险！
6、我不是孩子！（划掉）我是孩子。
【家庭守则】
1、家是你安宁的港湾，而我们是相亲相爱的一家人，尽量不要和家人发生冲突。
2、母亲负责做饭，父亲负责打扫卫生，孩子负责洗碗。
3、孩子需要在父母的陪伴下出门，否则后果自负。
4、十一点前必须在床上睡觉。
5、如果有让你感觉到陌生的人敲门，请不要给他开门，它很危险。
6、如果发现家中出现绿色苔藓，不要靠近和触碰，请当做没看见。
7、当家中出现绿色苔藓时，在家中要尽可能保持安静。
8、相信你的家人，他们是爱你的。如果遇到危险和麻烦，可以向你的家人求助。
（主角前期是女性）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4958b90ad3360fb39c929721df2db8f2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一份彩虹云","author_id":"","book_id":"7208635186982947875","book_name":"规则怪谈：我来书写规则","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#080830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5806人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7208635247326396928","read_count":"5806","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1145950"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"422","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,末世,直播,灵异,国运,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o4958b90ad3360fb39c929721df2db8f2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450862&x-signature=m7ieP8NP8a6X%2FyXwqp5uEI8Vl0o%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"79502043764","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"358"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319542247BBDBA091E676E7E551"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":692,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":80349,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3598},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7313584634247430948","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很棒 有很多女频的规则怪谈写的都没有什么逻辑性，而且太突出主角的强悍，莫名其妙会有很多技能，或者是强行组CP之类的。
但是尹竹真的是十分有个性，并且技能也是逐步成长，最开始的她只是一个普普通通的写作人，随着自己的努力逐步成长，最后，即使成为了真正的规则怪谈，也没有忘记自己的国家，国家也没有忘记她，简直就是双向奔赴。
规则怪谈的逻辑性很强，事情安排很合理，人物设定也很强，感觉已经很少能看到这么好看的女性鬼则怪谈了，而且篇幅合适，其实感觉可以更延展一点的，伏笔很多，最后也揭露了使得它的逻辑性更强，并且引烛以另一个角度去看一个和曾经的自己十分相似的世界，感觉整体都很好。","text_exts":[{"e":15,"s":11,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426686276E7E551%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227313584634247430948%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227208635186982947875%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":65,"s":63,"text":"尹竹","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%B9%E7%AB%B9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426686276E7E551%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227313584634247430948%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227208635186982947875%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%B9%E7%AB%B9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702827935,"group_id":"7208635186982947875","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxYt/Dk57kVTOuiO50cSB44liR5VSXtshW+jbStDYq1o","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p-passport-sign.bytedance.net/tos-cn-i-mgtsoo0paj/user-avatar_fc58f8afaa580f4848e935bd7a92f56a~tplv-noop.jpeg?x-orig-authkey=akmgtsoo0paj&x-orig-expires=2167038118&x-orig-sign=nTNj74CXwBzRRcMwgJF3KdyWcJo%3D","user_id":"2626053710555791","user_name":"空弦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2626053710555791","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":
